# LAB: RSS feed


```{r}
if(!require(tidyRSS)) {
  install.packages("remotes")
  remotes::install_github("robertmyles/tidyrss")
}
library(tidyRSS)
```

Your task is to read the RSS feed from the Daily Deac https://parents.wfu.edu/daily-deac/ and create a tidy data frame with the following columns:

```{r}

daily <- tidyRSS::tidyfeed("https://parents.wfu.edu/feed")

```
